title: Order of disjunctive clauses should not make a difference
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE urlparts (urlid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, urlname TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM urlparts WHERE urlid=218 OR urlid=219 OR urlid=329 OR urlid=3857 OR urlid=3868;
SELECT * FROM urlparts WHERE urlid=3868 OR urlid=3857 OR urlid=329 OR urlid=219 OR urlid=218;
SELECT urlname FROM urlparts WHERE urlid IN (SELECT urlid FROM urlparts WHERE urlid > 300);
key_bug_features: Order of disjunctive clauses in SQL queries
